name: Mikanko Shinbu - Noble Twins
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>御巫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>みかんこ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>舞</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>二貴子</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふたはしらのうずのみこ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_rom: Mikanko Shinbu - Futahashira no Uzu no Miko
name_jp_tl: Mikanko Divine Dance - The Two Noble Children
desc: Send 1 "Mikanko" card from your Deck to the GY, except "Mikanko Shinbu - Noble Twins", then you can Set 1 "Mikanko" Spell/Trap from your Deck, except "Mikanko Shinbu - Noble Twins". You cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, except "Mikanko" monsters. You can banish this card from your GY and detach 1 material from a monster you control; Special Summon 1 "Mikanko" Ritual Monster from your hand or Deck. You can only use 1 "Mikanko Shinbu - Noble Twins" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: Send 1 "Mikanko" card from your Deck to the GY, except "Mikanko Shinbu - Noble Twins", then you can Set 1 "Mikanko" Spell/Trap from your Deck, except "Mikanko Shinbu - Noble Twins". You cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, except "Mikanko" monsters. You can banish this card from your GY and detach 1 material from a monster you control; Special Summon 1 "Mikanko" Ritual Monster from your hand or Deck. You can only use 1 "Mikanko Shinbu - Noble Twins" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

jp_sets.set: Tactical-Try Pack: Dark Magic / HERO / Mikanko

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
